assertions.title: Harness wires task to artifact config to agent execution to result capture

steps.action: Run pytest on TestHarnessWiring class (6 tests)
steps.expected: All tests pass verifying call sequence: env.prepare -> agent.run -> env.execute(test_command) -> cleanup
steps.observed: All 6 tests passed. test_harness_calls_prepare_agent_execute_cleanup verifies full call sequence. test_harness_call_order_is_correct verifies exact order (prepare < execute < cleanup). test_harness_guarantees_cleanup_on_exception verifies cleanup on agent crash. test_harness_guarantees_cleanup_on_prepare_exception verifies cleanup on setup failure. test_harness_captures_test_execution_result verifies test result captured in TaskResult. test_harness_with_timeout_on_test_execution verifies timeout handling.

keyAssertions: TaskResult populated with correct task_id, status, score
Test execution failure reflected in result with ErrorCategory.TEST_FAILURE

assertions.title: Harness supports retry logic on transient failures

steps.action: Run pytest on TestHarnessRetry and TestTransientErrorDetection classes (16 tests)
steps.expected: Retry on RATE_LIMIT/API_ERROR/NETWORK_ERROR; no retry on TEST_FAILURE/TIMEOUT/SKIPPED/SUCCESS; configurable count and delay
steps.observed: All 16 tests passed. test_retry_on_rate_limit: agent called 3 times (2 failures + success). test_retry_on_api_error: agent called 2 times. test_retry_on_network_error: agent called 2 times. test_no_retry_on_test_failure: agent called 1 time. test_no_retry_on_timeout: agent called 1 time. test_no_retry_on_success: agent called 1 time. test_no_retry_on_skipped: agent called 1 time. test_retry_exhausts_max_retries: 3 calls (initial + 2 retries). test_retry_delay_is_respected: elapsed >= 0.15s with 2 retries of 0.1s. test_retry_with_zero_max_retries: 1 call only. TransientErrorDetection tests confirm RATE_LIMIT, API_ERROR, NETWORK_ERROR are retriable; TEST_FAILURE, TIMEOUT, UNKNOWN, SYNTAX_ERROR, ENVIRONMENT_ERROR, None are not.

keyAssertions: Delay respected between retries (elapsed >= 0.15s with 0.1s delay x 2)

assertions.title: Telemetry captures latency breakdown by phase

steps.expected: Telemetry records setup_s, execution_s, teardown_s, total_s; sum of phases approximates total_s within 100ms
steps.observed: Test passed. Verifies all phase durations >= 0 and abs(total_s - (setup_s + execution_s + teardown_s)) < 0.1

steps.expected: ToolCallMetrics records total_calls, successful_calls, failed_calls, by_tool breakdown, total_duration_ms
steps.observed: Test passed. Pre-populated collector with 3 tool calls (bash success, editor success, bash failure). Verified: total_calls=3, successful_calls=2, failed_calls=1, by_tool['bash']={calls:2, failures:1}, by_tool['editor']={calls:1}, total_duration_ms≈180.0

assertions.title: Telemetry is attached to every TaskResult

steps.action: Run 3 telemetry tests covering success, failure, and error (agent exception) cases
steps.expected: All TaskResults have non-null telemetry with latency.total_s > 0
steps.observed: All 3 tests passed. test_telemetry_attached_on_success: telemetry non-null, isinstance TelemetrySchema, total_s > 0. test_telemetry_attached_on_failure: same assertions pass. test_telemetry_attached_on_error: agent raises RuntimeError, telemetry still non-null with total_s > 0.

keyAssertions: result.telemetry is not None on SUCCESS
result.telemetry is not None on FAILURE
result.telemetry is not None on ERROR (agent exception)

assertions.title: Telemetry supports raw event audit trail

steps.expected: raw_events non-empty when trace_enabled=True; raw_events empty when trace_enabled=False
steps.observed: Both tests passed. With trace_enabled=True: raw_events is non-empty, contains events with phases 'prepare', 'execute', 'cleanup'. With trace_enabled=False: raw_events is empty list.

summary: Tested 6 assertions across 40 pytest tests: all passed. VAL-HARNESS-08 (6 tests): full harness wiring sequence verified with correct call order and cleanup guarantees. VAL-HARNESS-09 (16 tests): retry on transient errors (RATE_LIMIT, API_ERROR, NETWORK_ERROR), no retry on deterministic failures (TEST_FAILURE, TIMEOUT, SKIPPED), configurable count and delay. VAL-TELEM-02 (1 test): latency breakdown by phase with sum-within-100ms tolerance. VAL-TELEM-03 (1 test): tool call metrics including by_tool breakdown and total duration. VAL-TELEM-06 (3 tests): telemetry non-null on success, failure, and error paths. VAL-TELEM-07 (2 tests): raw_events populated with trace_enabled=True, empty with False. Additional 11 tests cover config defaults, transient error detection, and run_experiment helper.
